comments.author: github-actions
comments.body: **Dignified Python Review**: Inline import in conditional branch - imports must be at module level (exceptions: circular deps, TYPE_CHECKING, conditional features). This is lazy loading without documented exception.

comments.author: github-actions
comments.body: **Dignified Python Review**: Conditional feature import - acceptable per module-design.md §4.2.2 (only imported when `issues_explicitly_passed` is True, properly documented)
